name: specz
description: Document-driven spec workflow plugin with separate execution and verification agents, bounded repair loops, and summary-named spec bundles.

interface.shortDescription: Run a spec-driven workflow with execution and verification skills.
interface.longDescription: Specz helps agents execute document-driven tasks with explicit plan, exec, verify, archive, and auto-run workflows backed by bounded repair loops.
defaultPrompt: Use specz to plan a new spec bundle for this task.
Run the specz execution flow for the current change.
Verify this implementation with the specz verifier.
Archive this completed spec bundle into a single workflow record.
